verify._bad_proof_note: PJB_BILLING_EVENTS_INT is unconditionally purged after ImportBillingEventJob (MOS 2534525.1); the bad row's error text survives only in the ImportBillingEventReportJob XML. Authoritative BAD proof here is absence from the base table while good rows from the same load reached base.

base_read.sql: SELECT be.sourceref AS SOURCEREF, be.event_id AS EVENT_ID, be.event_num AS EVENT_NUM, TO_CHAR(be.bill_trns_amount) AS BILL_TRNS_AMOUNT FROM pjb_billing_events be WHERE be.sourceref LIKE :PREFIX || 'RT-BE-%'

interface_read.sql: SELECT i.sourceref AS SOURCEREF, i.load_request_id AS LOAD_REQUEST_ID, i.import_status AS IMPORT_STATUS, i.import_status AS ERROR_MESSAGE FROM pjb_billing_events_int i WHERE i.load_request_id = :LRID
